reports.summary: Listing Team EOD - Patricia Shane Celeste - 3.9.2026 Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary: Updates today covered enhancements to the Geon tool, including improvements to packa
reports.rawMessage:
Listing Team EOD - Patricia Shane Celeste - 3.9.2026

Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary:

Updates today covered enhancements to the Geon tool, including improvements to packaging image handling and product description variable support. Database maintenance was also carried out with the discontinuation of a unit and the application of EOL status to multiple product type-units as instructed. Listing operations across Amazon included the upload of weekly deliverables, relisting of a previously removed item, and ongoing implementation of EOL-related price revisions. Additionally, discontinued listings were removed across Amazon and eBay, and packaging image updates were applied to NBA listings across both marketplaces. Product listing quality was also improved through image updates and large-scale corrections addressing GPSR, SIPV, and product attribute issues affecting over 4,000 SKUs across European Amazon sites.

*TECHNICAL / TOOLS*
• Hard-coded NBA packaging image directory set to nba2 on Geon
• Support for HGS variables in product descriptions on Geon
*DATABASE*
• Discontinuation of unit HHYBK-IPH15 and completion of related database processes
• EOL status applied to 365 units (as per Sir Tim's instructions)
*AMAZON*
• Upload of last week's listing deliverables (67,000+ SKUs)
• Relisting of HLBWH-FIRE (IT)
• Ongoing: EOL price revision for the 365 newly EOL units (UK)
• Bulk fixes for GPSR, SIPV, and product attribute misuse affecting 4000+ SKUs across UK, DE, FR, IT, ES, NL, PL, and IE
*EBAY & AMAZON*
• Deletion of HC-S906X listings (discontinued unit)
• Packaging image updates for all NBA listings (Amazon: 93,000+ SKUs | eBay: 231 MVLs)

reports.summary: *Listing Team EOD - Chadle Rei Miclat- 3.9.2026* Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary: The report highlights bigcommerce listings of more NBA teams for BC, WWE and AFC. Some n
reports.rawMessage:
*Listing Team EOD - Chadle Rei Miclat- 3.9.2026*

Please see the EOD report below with a quick rendered summary:
	The report highlights bigcommerce listings of more NBA teams for BC, WWE and AFC. Some no case available listings have been temporarily discontinued. Some findings of the zero infrastructure was made with the help of AI. 322 folders of discontinued brands from the S3 server have been deleted.
*BIGCOMMERCE*
*Listed*
• NBA (BC #7, HB4 #7)
• NBA (BC #8, HB4 #8)
• WWE (BC #19, HB4 #19)
• Arsenal FC (BC #50, HB4 #50)
*Temporarily Discontinued*
• Feedonomics is pushing these models to Amazon:
• HLBWH-IPAD102
• HLBWH-KDL1122
• HB401-IPH15PMAX
• HLBWH-S918X
*ZERO*
*Findings*
• Investigated the server at 192.168.20.57, under /var/www/
• Folder (ongoing upload) can be found here: <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12KvmEqjoyLhNx8o0d0bfT_o0qEKQ9OlS?usp=sharing>
• Antigravity assisted in investigating the infrastructure of the folder and answered in some of the questions
• The documentation of the agent’s findings can be found here: <https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Y0K2GyaoCwZcyvPpiC5aZ0LphTSylsoY/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=109912547617926162811&rtpof=true&sd=true>
• Note that these findings need confirmation from sir Drew.
*AMAZON AWS S3*
*S3 Lineup/Design/Model deletion progress update*
• Deleted the folders for its discontinued lineups, some brands with the most lineups deleted:
• BT21, DOCW, FORD, UMAC, CSPW, PBLI, STHU, DAVO, EBIE, FCAT
• Total space deleted (today’s batch): *2,116.06 GB GB - potential savings of 48.67 USD per month*
• Total space deleted (starting from 3-5-2026): *5,458.03 - potential savings of 125.53 USD per month*
• See the attached text file for the full list of lineups deleted from the /atg/ folder, along with the number of folders/files and total size deleted.
